entconn — Enterprise Connect

📊

Blitz 2.0 Upload

The main Telstra billing export.
Must contain Blitz Summary, IR Detail and IDD Detail worksheets.

🌏

IDD/IR Report Upload

Optional. Used to auto-populate Comments in Top 20 Billed Users with roaming and IDD detail.

Optional — upload to enhance comments
💰

Adaptive Mobility Funds

Optional. Generates the Adaptive Mobility Funds summary and redemptions page.

Optional — upload to include funds page
🎫

Ticket Report

Optional. Generates a Ticket Report page for a selected customer.

Optional — loading data automatically…
Blitz 2.0 reads: Col I (Mobile No.), J (Username), R (Plan), U (Service Type), V (Plan Fee), AH (Device), JZ (Bill Total), OR (Discounts).
IDD/IR Report reads: Col F (Mobile No.), G (Country), H (Call Type), N (Billed Value).

Enterprise Fund Calculator — auto-filled values

The following monthly spend amounts will be entered into the yellow cells in the Enterprise Fund Calculator sheet. The fund value (10% or 5%) is then calculated from these figures.

Data & IP (G12) · 10%
$—
Internet & Connectivity
UC (G25) · 5%
$—
SIP/VoIP + TCO365 calling
Cloud w/o PS (G22) · 5% ⚠
$—
M365 licences — needs approval
Security (G28) · 5%
$—
Managed Network Services
⚠ Cloud / M365 contributions require Telstra Funds Helpdesk approval before they can be included. Cloud+PS (G16) cannot be determined from billing data — enter manually. Always verify MMC is between $1,000 and $250,000/month.
